title: Visual Ping
description: Displays the player's numerical ping in the tablist
body:
**Visual Ping** is a simple and useful Fabric mod that shows players' numeric ping directly in the tablist. It helps you quickly understand connection quality and server performance without opening debug screens or using extra commands.
![tablist](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93694af287ab600c65b7e783d49065fb82f8373b.png)
## ✨ Features
- Real-time numeric ping display in the tablist
- Automatic color changes based on ping
- Lightweight and performance-friendly
- Fully compatible with Fabric Loader
- Perfect for multiplayer servers
## 🎨 Ping Color System
The ping value changes color automatically depending on connection quality:
![colorlist](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ebaf70362f9b3ef9d376a879af9e9c0350d11c6_0.webp)
## 🚀 Why Should We Use Visual Ping?
- Quickly identify laggy players
- Monitor server stability
- Improve multiplayer experience
- Clean and minimal UI integration
## 📦 Requirements
- Minecraft (Fabric)
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API (recommended)
